measurement_note: Size is W, the number of one-letter words; sentence length is 2W-1. The 10/25/50 tiers span 5x and remain within the 100-character limit. No word matches, so direct boundary scanning exercises all W words in O(N) time. A correct alternative examines every word and recomputes its 1-based index by recounting all preceding words, takes O(W^2), completes normally at W = 50, and is rejected by scaling.
